mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subs ( subs_us_num, subs_name, subs_price, subs_type, subs_billing_day, subs_active, subs_start_date, subs_icon ) VALUES ( #{subsUsNum}, #{subsName}, #{subsPrice}, #{subsType}, #{subsBillingDay}, #{subsActive}, #{subsStartDate}, #{subsIcon} )

INSERT INTO subs ( subs_us_num, subs_name, subs_price, subs_type, subs_billing_day, subs_active, subs_start_date, subs_icon ) VALUES
( #{s.subsUsNum}, #{s.subsName}, #{s.subsPrice}, #{s.subsType}, #{s.subsBillingDay}, #{s.subsActive}, #{s.subsStartDate}, #{s.subsIcon} )
mapper.select: SELECT subs_num, subs_us_num, subs_name, subs_price, subs_type, subs_billing_day, subs_active, subs_start_date, subs_icon FROM subs WHERE subs_us_num = #{userNum} ORDER BY subs_billing_day, subs_num

SELECT subs_num, subs_us_num, subs_name, subs_type, subs_price, subs_billing_day, subs_active, subs_start_date, subs_icon FROM subs WHERE subs_us_num = #{userNum}
ORDER BY subs_price
ORDER BY subs_num
ORDER BY subs_start_date
DESC
ASC
